title: China reopening boosts sentiment in industrial metal markets
section_path: China reopening boosts sentiment in industrial metal markets
section_path_text: China reopening boosts sentiment in industrial metal markets
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
A weaker USD and optimism over a China reopening supported sentiment across commodity markets. However, falls in gas and coal markets dragged the broader complex into the red. Image reference: 1670533682874.png | assets/2022-12-09_china-reopening-boosts-sentiment-in-industrial-metal-markets_img_1670533682874_965704bf11ae.png
.Copper led the base metals higher as optimism over China's economic outlook grows.
